Headline: #43 43rd Temporary Westbound Reroute near 43rd/Vincennes
ShortDescription: WB 43 43rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 43rd, Vincennes, Oakwood, King Drive, 43rd and over regular route, due to street blockage near 43rd/Vincennes.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Westbound #43 43rd buses are temporarily rerouted via 43rd, Vincennes, Oakwood, King Drive, 43rd and over regular route, due to street blockage near 43rd/Vincennes.
